title: Teal Minimal Productivity Habits LinkedIn Carousel

A.A: for When You Always Feel Behind
Batch your inbox. Check email at set times, not all day.
Plan tomorrow before you log off today. Five minutes now saves twenty tomorrow morning.
Protect one deep-work block. Close the tabs, mute notifications, do the one thing that matters most.
Say no to meetings without an agenda. If there's nothing to decide, there's nothing to attend.
End the day with a 2-minute review. What got done, what's carrying over — clear head, clear tomorrow.
plan tomorrow tonight, protect one deep-work block
review for 2 minutes before you log off.
